description_long: This is a modern, multi-level house featuring a flat roof, extensive use of glass walls, and a mix of white and dark gray exterior surfaces. The structure is surrounded by lush landscaping, including large tropical plants and trees, which add a natural element to the contemporary design. The upper level includes a rooftop terrace with lounge chairs and a small pool, while the lower levels have open living spaces visible through large windows. The house has a geometric, angular layout with several outdoor patios and balconies, providing ample outdoor living areas. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and minimal decorative elements, blending seamlessly into the facade. The overall aesthetic is sleek and minimalist, emphasizing clean lines and open, light-filled interiors.
description: A sleek, modern multi-story house with flat roofs, large glass walls, and lush tropical landscaping. Features include rooftop terraces, open patios, and minimalist design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, rooftop terrace with pool, and large glass windows revealing interior spaces.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rooftop lounge area, extensive glass walls, and prominent tropical plants adjacent to the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying multiple balconies, patios, and dense landscaping with large-leafed plants.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the layered structure, flat roof, and integration of greenery around the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass walls
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a simple door, no porch, and flush integration into the facade
